dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend log_data_flattened = bag_merge(bag_remove_keys(log_data, dynamic(["blocked_details", "web_filtering_details", "account_details", "dlp_details", "extension_details"])), coalesce(log_data.blocked_details, dynamic({})), coalesce(log_data.web_filtering_details, dynamic({})), coalesce(log_data.account_details, dynamic({})), coalesce(log_data.dlp_details, dynamic({})), coalesce(log_data.extension_details, dynamic({}))) | extend actual_timestamp = coalesce(todatetime(log_data_flattened.timestamp), todatetime(["_created"])) | extend log_data_final = case(event_cat in ("general", "dashboard_auth", "dashboard_audit", "device_status"), dynamic(null), bag_remove_keys(log_data_flattened, dynamic(["timestamp"]))) | project TimeGenerated = actual_timestamp, Username = username, ClientIP = client_ip, EventCategory = event_cat, EventId = event_id, Level = level, Message = tostring(message.en), LogData = log_data_final
